title: Clean HUD
description: Only shows health/hunger/armor when they change, fades out otherwise
body:
# CleanHUD

CleanHUD keeps your screen clean without taking useful information away. Core HUD elements can fade out when they are not needed, and optional Info HUD lines can stay visible exactly where you want them.

Built for **Fabric**, **Forge**, and **NeoForge**.

## What CleanHUD Can Do

### Fade the vanilla HUD

You can configure these HUD elements individually:

- `health`
- `hunger`
- `armor`
- `air`
- `experience`
- `mount_health`
- `hotbar`
- `crosshair`
- `held_item`
- `status_effects`
- `boss_bar`

Each supported HUD element can be configured with:

- **Fade enabled** on/off
- **Fade if not full** on/off where it makes sense
- **Hold ticks**
- **Fade ticks**
- **Reset to global/default behavior**

### Show an optional Info HUD

CleanHUD also includes an Info HUD with individually toggleable items:

- `coords` — player coordinates
- `fps` — FPS counter
- `chunk` — chunk coordinates
- `facing` — facing direction
- `light` — light level
- `biome` — current biome
- `memory` — memory usage
- `looking` — what you are looking at, with coordinates
- `speed` — movement speed
- `ping` — player ping

Each Info HUD item can be:

- Enabled or disabled individually
- Placed in any corner:
	- `top_left`
	- `top_right`
	- `bottom_right`
	- `bottom_left`

The Info HUD also has a single **global text size** setting shared by all info items.

Available text sizes currently include:

- `0.25x`
- `0.50x`
- `0.75x`
- `1.00x`
- `1.25x`
- `1.50x`
- `1.75x`
- `2.00x`

## In-Game Configuration

Open the menu with:

- `/cleanhud`
- `/ch`

From the main config screen you can:

- Configure fading behavior for vanilla HUD elements
- Open the dedicated **Info HUD** screen
- Toggle each info item on/off
- Change each info item corner
- Change Info HUD text size
- Use **All ON** and **All OFF** for the Info HUD

## Commands

### Open the menu

- `/cleanhud`
- `/cleanhud menu`
- `/ch`
- `/ch menu`

### HUD fade commands

```text
/cleanhud status [element]
/cleanhud fade <element|all> <true|false>
/cleanhud hold <element|all> <ticks>
/cleanhud fadeTicks <element|all> <ticks>
/cleanhud reset <element|all>
```

### Info HUD commands

```text
/cleanhud info status [item]
/cleanhud info toggle <item|all> <true|false>
/cleanhud info corner <item|all> <top_left|top_right|bottom_right|bottom_left>
/cleanhud info allOn
/cleanhud info allOff
```

The same commands are also available through `/ch`.

## Why Use CleanHUD?

CleanHUD is made for players who want less clutter without losing useful information. You can keep the screen minimal during normal gameplay, while still showing the exact HUD and player info you care about.
